name: Open Sesame-Ginger Dip
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Green Onion; Chopped, Use All
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mustard, ginger, and soy sauce.
Blend well to mix.
2. Add the sesame oil, sesame seeds, black pepper, and green onion.
Mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in the sour cream until fully combined.
4. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator.
5. This recipe makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip.
6. Suggested dippers: Chicken Strips or Cubes, Fried Wontons, Noodle Chips, Bok Choy
